input.command:
cd "/lustre/fast/fast/sgoel/forecasting/current_sim/final_runs_v37/claude_code_aljazeeraQ12026v37_glm52_r00/26-06-14-19-17-03/agents/minimalHarness_glm-52[1m]_001/workspace"
for d in 27 28; do
  f="articles/2026/02/$d/articles.jsonl"
  [ -f "$f" ] || continue
  echo "=== Feb $d ==="
  grep -ohiE "(bat yam|tel aviv|ramat gan|petah tikva|rishon)[^.]{0,50}(nine|9 deaths|killed|missile|iran)[^.]*" "$f" 2>/dev/null | head -3
  grep -ohiE "(saudi arabia|uae|qatar|bahrain)[^.]{0,50}(missile|drone|majority|struck)[^.]*" "$f" 2>/dev/null | head -3
  grep -ohiE "(taleghani|mehr|firoozgar|hospital)[^.]{0,40}(tehran|struck|hit)[^.]*" "$f" 2>/dev/null | head -3
done
